tsTroubleshooting.domains: (topic tsTroubleshooting) (topic hi-d) (topic sdlVariables-c) (topic ut-d) (topic indexing-d) (topic sw-d) (topic ui-d) (topic oce-d) (topic oceCommonElements-c) (topic oceTopic-c hi-d oceHighlight-c) (topic oceTopic-c ui-d oceUi-c) (topic oceTopic-c sw-d oceSoftware-c) (topic oceTopic-c) (topic oceTopic-c task oceTask-c) (topic oceTopic-c tsTroubleshooting oceTroubleshooting-c)
tsTroubleshooting.title: 12 Remaining media length indication is not correct

abstract.p: Remaining media length indication on the operator panel is not according to actual media length on the media roll.

li.p: Remaining media indicates unknown or 0 on the operator panel, while media still is on the roll.
Roll empty is reported while remaining media length on the operator panel is not 0

tsSymptoms.p: The media properties (outer core diameter) have to be configured correctly in the media profile. When configured, the media has to be reloaded to be effectuated.
On first time use of the media, the remaining roll length remains "unknown" until approximately 20% of the thickness of the roll is printed.

On next use of the media, the remaining media length will become visible after 2 revolutions of the media roll, with an accuracy of +/- 4 meter (13.1'), after 6 revolutions of the roll the accuracy is within +/- 1 meter (3.3').
